title: geodorum candidum
intro: Geodorum candidum, also known as the white geodorum or white orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family, characterized by its delicate white flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine, particularly in Malaysian and Indonesian folk medicine, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Geodorum candidum include its ability to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and sore throat, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in tea infusions or decoctions, while its roots and tubers are also used in various medicinal concoctions.
